description: Baseline allowlist for scripts/check-accent-as-text.js — pre-existing colors.accent-as-text sites, seeded at FTY-191 by snapshotting the guard's own output on the live tree. Each entry is a per-file count of accent-as-text sites still present in that file, in source order; the guard exempts a file's first `count` sites and fails on anything beyond that. Per-screen application stories (FTY-207-212) drain their file's count to 0 and delete the entry as they swap to colors.accentText; the guard is fully strict once this list is empty.

sites.reason: mobile-onboarding lane — FTY-211 (selected-option label, formerly OnboardingScreen.tsx).
mobile-settings lane — FTY-212 (selected-segment label, formerly SettingsScreen.tsx).
